evals.prompt: Is JustGotFound worth submitting to for backlinks? How does it compare to other free directories?
evals.expected_output: Explains JustGotFound offers free dofollow backlinks but at DR23, which is low compared to alternatives. Compares with SoloPush (DR46), ProductBurst (DR46), and Open Launch (DR65). Recommends still submitting since it's free and instant, but not prioritizing over higher-DR options.

assertions.name: dr_value
assertions.description: States JustGotFound DR is 23, which is low compared to alternatives

assertions.name: dofollow_confirmed
assertions.description: Confirms the free backlink is dofollow

assertions.name: higher_dr_alternatives
assertions.description: Recommends higher-DR free alternatives like SoloPush (DR46), ProductBurst (DR46), or Open Launch (DR65)

evals.prompt: Should I pay $180/month for JustGotFound promotion? What do I get?
evals.expected_output: Explains the 1-month tier costs $216 with 20% tax, includes priority ranking, social media promo, and weekly reports. Compares with Open Launch ($12 for DR65) and OpenHunts ($9.90 for DR50). Recommends alternatives offer far better value.

assertions.name: features_listed
assertions.description: Lists what the 1-month tier includes: priority ranking, social media promotion, weekly reports

assertions.name: cheaper_alternatives
assertions.description: Recommends Open Launch ($12 for DR65) or OpenHunts ($9.90 for DR50) as better value alternatives

evals.prompt: How do I submit my product to JustGotFound? What categories are available?
evals.expected_output: Walks through submission: create account, prepare materials, submit to relevant category. Lists categories with AI & ML being largest (471 products), followed by Productivity (420), Web Apps (283), Marketing (268), Dev Tools (148).

assertions.name: submission_steps
assertions.description: Describes the submission process: create account, prepare materials, submit product

assertions.name: categories_listed
assertions.description: Lists available categories including AI & ML, Productivity, Web Apps, Marketing, Dev Tools

assertions.name: instant_listing
assertions.description: Notes that submission is instant with no editorial queue
